---
description: Instructions for creating a fast, modern, and minimal luxury website for "Sartorial 55" in Luanda, Angola.
applyTo: '**/*.html, **/*.css, **/*.js'
---
<!--
Create a fast, modern and minimal luxury website for a premium tailoring brand "Sartorial 55" in Luanda, Angola.

Tech:
- HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript
- No external libraries

Goals:
- Fast loading (<2s)
- SEO optimized
- Google Ads compliant

Sections:
- Hero with CTA "Agendar Medida"
- About brand
- Services (suits, shirts, shoes, adjustments)
- Process steps
- Gallery (lazy loading images)
- Booking form (name, phone, date)
- Contact + location

Style:
- Minimalist (black, white, gray)
- Elegant typography
- Clean layout

Features:
- Responsive (mobile-first)
- Smooth scroll
- WhatsApp button
- Basic form validation

Rules:
- Use semantic HTML
- Optimize images (WebP, lazy load)
- Keep code clean and lightweight
-->
